description: Infinite Campus student grades and assignment tracker

targets.expr:
sum(
  ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"} == 1
  and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
  ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)
) or vector(0)
sum(ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"}) or vector(0)

sum(ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="late"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)) or vector(0)

sum(ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="incomplete"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)) or vector(0)

avg(ic_assignment_score_percentage{student_name=~"$student"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800))

avg by (course_name) (ic_assignment_score_percentage{student_name=~"$student"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800))

ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(time() - ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"}) / 86400
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000)
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="late"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(time() - ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"}) / 86400
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="late"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000)
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="late"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="incomplete"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(time() - ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"}) / 86400
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="incomplete"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

(ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000)
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="incomplete"} == 1
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_score_percentage{student_name=~"$student"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_score_points{student_name=~"$student"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_total_points{student_name=~"$student"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)
ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="missing"}

ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="late"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

ic_assignment_flag{student_name=~"$student", flag="turnedin"} and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id) ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} > (time() - $weeks * 604800)

include.pattern: ^(course_name|assignment_name|Value A|Value B|Value C|Value D|Value E|Value F)$

targets.expr: ((ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} - time()) / 86400 > 0) < ($weeks * 7)

(ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000)
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
(((ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} - time()) / 86400 > 0) < ($weeks * 7))

(ic_assignment_assigned_date_timestamp_seconds{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000)
and on(assignment_name, course_name, student_name, student_id)
(((ic_assignment_due_date_timestamp{student_name=~"$student"} - time()) / 86400 > 0) < ($weeks * 7))
ic_enrollment_info{student_name=~"$student", enrollment_type="current"}
ic_school_year_start_timestamp_seconds{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000
ic_school_year_end_timestamp_seconds{student_name=~"$student"} * 1000
(ic_school_year_end_timestamp_seconds{student_name=~"$student"} - time()) / 86400

title: Infinite Campus - Student Grades
